Username must be 3-16 characters!: Say username et nepeg ya 3-16 ya karakter!
Password must contain at least one upper: Say password et nepeg ya walaan na anggan sakey a baleg a letra!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Say password et nepeg ya 8-16 ya karakter!
Password must contain at least one symbo: Say password et nepeg ya walaan na anggan sakey a simbolo!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Say karukey na ngaran na manguusar et nepeg ya walad baetan na 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Say karukey na password et nepeg ya walad baetan na 8-16
Password must contain at least one lower: Say password et nepeg ya walay anggan sakey ya melag a letra!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Say password et nepeg ya walay anggan sakey a numero to!
Man-type na sakey a balikas ed lenguahe yo...
